item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.96,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"过去三周退货率升高、满意度下降、平均处理时长拉长"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"现在要判断是否更换物流商，请给我决策框架"}],"abstain_reason":"仅有单轮决策框架请求，未提供至少三次先前同类本地修复或同类症状复发历史。"}
